question: What are the city name and average distances from each city?
sql: SELECT City.city_name, AVG(Direct_distance.distance) AS average_distances FROM City JOIN Direct_distance ON City.city_code = Direct_distance.city1_code OR City.city_code = Direct_distance.city2_code GROUP BY City.city_name;

back_translation.intent: 计算每个城市的平均距离

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求获取每个城市的名称及其平均距离，SQL描述通过JOIN City和Direct_distance表，使用AVG(Direct_distance.distance)聚合函数并按City.city_name分组实现该需求，且列选择和分组逻辑完全匹配。
